name: AZ Health Club HK Portal Consolidation

targetExperience.name: AZ Health Club HK Portal
targetExperience.description: Consolidate multiple AstraZeneca Hong Kong patient/product sites (azhealthclub-info.com.hk, crestor.com.hk, www.forxiga.com.hk, www.symbicort.com.hk) and the existing azhealthclub.com.hk into a single portal under azhealthclub.com.hk. The target organizes content into an /info section (patient program portal), per-brand sections (/crestor, /forxiga, /symbicort), and existing therapeutic-area / disease-awareness / patient-assistance content already on azhealthclub.com.hk.
targetExperience.providedSitemap: User supplied an explicit Proposed Sitemap mapping (HK_sitemap.md) listing target azhealthclub.com.hk URLs paired 1:1 with their equivalent current source URLs across five source sites. The provided sitemap is the authoritative source for Step 2 and Step 3.

sourceSites.name: azhealthclub-info
sourceSites.role: Patient program / patient services portal — patient assistance programs (PAP), partner organisations, saving scheme, instant / HASFI participation flows.

sourceSites.name: crestor
sourceSites.role: Crestor brand patient/disease-awareness site (cholesterol management content).

sourceSites.name: forxiga
sourceSites.role: Forxiga brand patient site with Traditional Chinese (/tc) and Simplified Chinese (/sc) locales — dosing, patient registration, product authentication, heart failure & CKD information.

sourceSites.name: symbicort
sourceSites.role: Symbicort brand patient site (single landing page in the provided mapping).

sourceSites.name: azhealthclub-current
sourceSites.role: Existing AZ Health Club HK site — therapeutic areas (cardiovascular, respiratory, gastrointestinal, diabetes, CKD, hyperkalemia, respiratory virus), disease-area pages, PAP indexes, drug-assistance pages, medical articles, terms and policies. Will be restructured under the same domain.

constraints: Source URLs and proposed target paths are fixed by the user-supplied HK_sitemap.md.
Some source URLs appear twice in the mapping (canonicalisation aliases) — these map to the same target path and should be deduplicated to a single mapping per source URL.
Forxiga is bilingual (/tc and /sc) — both locales must be preserved on the target.
Other source sites are monolingual Traditional Chinese; the target portal must keep TC as the primary locale.
successCriteria: Every source URL in HK_sitemap.md has exactly one target path on azhealthclub.com.hk.
Forxiga TC and SC pages remain locale-pair siblings under /forxiga/tc and /forxiga/sc.
Target sitemap reflects the user's proposed path structure (/info, /crestor, /forxiga/tc, /forxiga/sc, /symbicort, plus existing top-level paths).
